title: Design System: atoomic.org — Nicolas R. portfolio

headline.purpose: Section titles + about title; may carry .text-gradient.

body.purpose: DM Sans base copy at 16px/1.65; leads step up to ~1.28rem.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, nav, tags, kickers, fact labels (0.68–0.91rem micro-scale).

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Resting depth: cards, status pill, writing card, floating cards.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Hover depth and contact-panel / portrait resting shadow.

shadows.name: header-scrolled
shadows.purpose: Subtle shadow on the sticky header once scrolled.

shadows.name: gold-glow-button
shadows.purpose: Primary button resting glow; deepens to 0 18px 42px on hover.

motion.name: capability-hover
motion.value: transform 240ms ease, border-color 240ms ease, box-shadow 240ms ease

motion.name: float
motion.purpose: Hero floating cards; second card staggered 1.4s.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: prefers-reduced-motion: flatten motion, force reveals visible, gradient text → solid gold.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop nav → hamburger drawer; grids collapse to 1fr; sticky disabled.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Header 68px; portrait blob radius changes; timeline rail moves to left:5px.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Brand wordmark hides; hero buttons full-width.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold fill, near-black text, leading icon, gold glow; lifts and brightens on hover.
components.html: Explore my work
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display: inline-flex; min-height: 50px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; padding: 0 20px; border: 1px solid var(--accent, #f5c518); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--accent, #f5c518); color: #111318; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.91rem; font-weight: 800; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 14px 35px rgba(245,197,24,0.28); transition: transform 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-strong, #ffd83d); box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(245,197,24,0.28); transform: translateY(-3px); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--accent, #f5c518); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Translucent surface fill with hairline border; lifts to surface-hover on hover.
components.css: .ds-button { display: inline-flex; min-height: 50px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; padding: 0 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(18,23,33,0.8); color: #f6f7f9; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.91rem; font-weight: 800; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-button:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); background: #191f2b; transform: translateY(-3px); } .ds-button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #f5c518; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Tag
components.description: Gold-soft wash pill used for capability/experience tags.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; padding: 7px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(245,197,24,0.12); color: #a9b0bc; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Capability Card
components.description: Large 30px-radius card with a blurred color blob (::before), number + icon, hover lift -8px.
components.html:
01

Agentic orchestration

Multi-agent systems that decompose complex work.
components.css: .ds-cap-card { position: relative; min-height: 390px; overflow: hidden; padding: 30px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 30px; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(18,23,33,0.96), rgba(18,23,33,0.8)); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); transition: transform 240ms ease, border-color 240ms ease, box-shadow 240ms ease; } .ds-cap-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -120px; right: -100px; width: 270px; height: 270px; border-radius: 50%; background: #f5c518; filter: blur(90px); opacity: 0.11; pointer-events: none; } .ds-cap-card:hover { border-color: rgba(245,197,24,0.42); box-shadow: 0 30px 90px rgba(0,0,0,0.36); transform: translateY(-8px); } .ds-cap-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; color: #767f8e; font-family: 'Manrope', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .ds-cap-icon { display: grid; width: 50px; height: 50px; place-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(245,197,24,0.32); border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(245,197,24,0.10); color: #f5c518; } .ds-cap-icon svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ds-cap-title { margin: 72px 0 16px; font-family: 'Manrope', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.65rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.045em; line-height: 1.05; color: #f6f7f9; } .ds-cap-copy { margin: 0; color: #a9b0bc; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Elevated-bg field with hairline border; gold border + soft ring on focus.
components.html: <label class="ds-field-label" for="ds-name">Name</label><input class="ds-input" id="ds-name" type="text" placeholder="Your name" />
components.css: .ds-field-label { display: block; color: #a9b0bc; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 52px; padding-inline: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 12px; background: #10141c; color: #f6f7f9; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; transition: border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #767f8e; } .ds-input:focus { outline: 0; border-color: #f5c518; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(245,197,24,0.12); }

components.name: Brand Logo
components.description: Gold ☢ disc with glow + 'atoomic.' wordmark (trailing dot gold).
components.css: .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Manrope', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #f6f7f9; } .ds-brand-mark { display: grid; width: 38px; height: 38px; place-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); border-radius: 50%; background: #f5c518; color: #111318; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(245,197,24,0.28); font-size: 1.1rem; } .ds-brand-text { color: #f6f7f9; }

narrative.overview: The portfolio is a dark stage where a career runs as current. Gold (#f5c518) is the live wire — the ☢ mark, CTAs, links, focus rings, the timeline rail, and the gradient that lights display headings. The canvas is a warm near-black (#090b10) washed with gold and blue radial glows; surfaces are translucent panels over that atmosphere. A remembered light theme mirrors the dark default. Manrope (display, 800) pairs with DM Sans (body); hierarchy is weight + a fluid clamp() scale. Every surface is tactile: cards lift on hover, the hero portrait floats with glass info-cards and orbit rings, the status dot pulses, sections reveal on scroll. The system rejects the Generic SaaS/AI template, the stock green-on-black developer portfolio, corporate beige/gray, and empty minimalism.
keyCharacteristics: One live-wire accent — Gold — carries CTAs, links, headings, focus rings, the ☢ mark, and the gradient display text.
Dark-first with a light mirror; both driven by [data-theme] token overrides.
Manrope display + DM Sans body, hierarchy via weight + fluid clamp() scale.
Hybrid elevation: translucent floating surfaces, soft response shadows, large blurred color blobs on feature cards.
Tactile motion — hover lifts, gold glows, pulsing status dot, floating hero cards, scroll-reveal.

rules.name: The Live-Wire Rule
rules.body: Gold is the only saturated primary. It carries every CTA, link, heading accent, focus ring, timeline rail, and the ☢ mark. Neutrals never compete; when gold appears, it is the signal.

rules.name: The Ink-on-Gold Rule
rules.body: Any text or glyph on a gold fill is #111318 near-black — never white. The logo ☢, primary button label, and ::selection all obey this.

rules.name: The Drench Permission
rules.body: On hero/feature surfaces gold may own real area (logo glow, featured-card radial, contact radial). It is never a 1px stripe.

rules.name: The Gradient-Signature Rule
rules.body: .text-gradient (110deg text→gold) is a committed brand signature on display headings only — never body copy. Under reduced-motion it falls back to solid accent-strong.

rules.name: The Fluid-Scale Rule
rules.body: Every heading uses clamp(); tracking tightens as size grows (hero -0.075em → title -0.04em). Display ceiling ≤ 8.4rem.

rules.name: The Responsive-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Cards rest on Shadow SM and lift to Shadow LG on hover (-4 to -8px). Heavier resting shadows belong only to the featured capability cards, contact panel, and portrait.

rules.name: The Glass-Is-Purposeful Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter appears only on the scrolled header, mobile menu, status pill, and hero floating cards — never decorative glass-card grids.

dos: Do let Gold own real surface area on hero/feature moments (logo glow, featured-card radial, contact radial).
Do put #111318 text on every gold fill (logo glyph, primary button, selection).
Do apply .text-gradient to display headings only; fall back to solid Gold under reduced motion.
Do keep body text ≥4.5:1 on dark (light theme deepens gold to #c99900 to hold contrast).
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: kill float/pulse/reveal, force reveals visible, flatten the gradient text.
Do mark focus with the 3px Gold :focus-visible outline at 4px offset.
donts: Don't introduce a second saturated primary; blue/green/violet are capability-card accents only.
Don't put white text on a gold fill; use #111318.
Don't apply .text-gradient to body copy, labels, or long prose — display headings only.
Don't reach for the Generic SaaS/AI template (indigo-violet gradient heroes, glassy card grids, 'trusted by' strips, hero-metric blocks).
Don't dress the site as a terminal (green-on-black, matrix rain, decorative code).
Don't default to beige/gray neutrals or ship empty minimalism.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism; reserve backdrop-filter for header, mobile menu, status pill, and hero floating cards.
Don't animate layout properties; use transform, opacity, blur, and grid-template-rows for the accordion.
